name: midwest-shipment-root

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run start" "npm --prefix frontend run start"
scripts.stable-start: npm run verify && concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install

postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
